basic_hint: Manage launch behavior and the global hotkey without leaving the main configuration flow.
provider_hint: Connect a provider, pick the active model, and refresh the list from its API after saving your key.
prompt_hint: Switch between prompt profiles or create your own prompt set for translate and polish actions.
appearance_hint: Choose the interface language. Changes apply immediately without restarting SnapLingo.
advanced_hint: Review storage, workflow, and language status for the current desktop setup.
hotkey_hint: Choose the shortcut that opens the translation panel from anywhere in Windows.
placeholder_load_models: Save an API key to load models
clipboard_prompt: Direct capture is not ready on Windows. Press Ctrl+C to continue.
state_ready_status: Use the global hotkey or trigger the workflow from this window.
state_capturing_status: Waiting for selected text or a clipboard fallback.
state_clipboard_primary: Windows preview currently uses clipboard fallback for selection capture.
state_clipboard_status: Press Ctrl+C in the current app. SnapLingo will continue automatically as soon as the clipboard changes.
state_partial_kept_status: Kept the quick translation because the final polish step did not finish.
state_error_status: Retry the flow or switch modes.
error_no_copied_text: SnapLingo never received copied text. Press the hotkey again or use the current clipboard.
error_empty_clipboard: The clipboard does not contain text yet. Copy some text first and try again.
status_removed_key: Removed {0} API key from secure local storage.
status_save_key_first: Save an API key first, then SnapLingo can load models automatically.
status_prompt_fields_required: Name, translate prompt, and polish prompt are required.
status_api_key_saved: Saved securely for the current provider.
status_api_key_missing: No API key has been saved for the current provider.
error_hotkey_register: Could not register {0}. Windows returned {1}. Try a different preset.
error_add_api_key: Add an API key in Settings to use translation.
error_provider_empty_result: The provider returned an empty result.
error_provider_untrusted_result: The provider returned a result SnapLingo cannot trust.
error_provider_busy: The provider is temporarily busy. SnapLingo retried, but the request still did not finish.
error_provider_http: The provider request failed with HTTP {0}.
error_save_key_first_models: Save an API key first, then SnapLingo can load models automatically.
error_fetch_models_http: Could not load models from {0}. HTTP {1}.
error_fetch_models_endpoint: {0} did not expose a model-list endpoint for this API key or base URL. SnapLingo kept the single preset model instead.
error_fetch_models_ark: Volcengine Ark does not expose model listing through the runtime API key used by SnapLingo. Its official model-list APIs are control-plane APIs that use HMAC-signed credentials.
error_fetch_models_none: No usable text models were returned by {0}.
error_models_malformed: The provider model list response was malformed.
hotkey_banner_hint: Select text and press the hotkey to open the translation or polish panel.
panel_original_hint_capturing: Reading the text you just selected.
panel_original_hint_waiting_clipboard: If direct selection capture fails, SnapLingo will continue from the clipboard fallback.
panel_original_hint_error: This run did not finish. Select text again and the panel will reopen automatically.
panel_original_hint_idle: Select text anywhere in Windows and SnapLingo will open this standalone panel automatically.
panel_clipboard_banner: If direct capture is not available in the current app, press Ctrl+C manually and SnapLingo will continue.
panel_error_banner: The workflow did not finish. Retry it, or select the text again.
